text:
Created attachment 194932
Proposed patch (since 473503 revision)

Patch to update editors/focuswriter port from 1.6.13 to 1.6.14 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/compare/v1.6.13...v1.6.14
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/blob/v1.6.14/ChangeLog#L1-L5

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.4 amd64.
